description: Output schema for Skill 07 — Brand Voice. All fields required. No null values permitted. Written to phase-1-5/outputs/07-brand-voice.json as pure JSON.

selected_voice_archetype.description: The single archetype selected from the 5-archetype matrix. Chosen by mapping dominant_emotion + psychographic.

name.description: One of: Scientific Authority (Caples) | Results-Oriented Mentorship | Conversational Intimacy (Halbert) | Poetic / Sensory Realism | Playful & Energetic

tone_descriptors.description: Exactly 3 adjectives that define the voice tone.

sentence_structure_rule.description: One-line rule governing sentence construction for this archetype.

psychological_trigger.description: The primary psychological mechanism this archetype activates in the reader.

niche_rationale.description: 2-3 sentences explaining why this archetype fits this specific niche and persona.

nesb_voice_calibration.description: NESB (New / Easy / Safe / Big) framework applied to this niche at this price point.

new_framing.description: How to frame novelty without arrogance. Use 'stumbled on' / 'discovered by accident' language. Never 'revolutionary' or 'breakthrough'.

easy_framing.description: Not-statement + Even-If template filled for this niche. Format: 'It's not X. It's not Y. It's [mechanism]. [Goal] — even if [biggest objection].'

safe_framing.description: Risk language and assurance phrasing adjacent to any risk claim. Include guarantee language calibrated to price_point.

big_framing.description: Transformation scale matched to price_point. $17=quick win, $27=habit shift, $37=system change, $47=identity-level transformation.

banned_words.description: 40 words across 4 categories that must never appear in any output. Minimum 10 per category.

corporate_verbs.description: 10 corporate action verbs to ban. Replace with Anglo-Saxon equivalents.

abstract_nouns.description: 10 abstract conceptual nouns to ban. Replace with concrete specifics.

vague_adjectives.description: 10 vague quality adjectives to ban. Replace with measurable descriptors.

transition_fillers.description: 10 filler transition phrases to ban. Replace with direct verbal bridges.

power_words_by_emotion.description: 50 power words across 5 emotional categories (10 each). dominant_emotion category applied at 3x frequency.

sentence_architecture.description: Structural rules governing all copy written in this brand voice.

max_paragraph_sentences.description: Maximum sentences per paragraph. Fixed at 3.

rhythm_rule.description: Rule for alternating sentence lengths. Short (1-5 words) = impact. Long = emotional runway. Never 3+ same-length in a row.

vocabulary_rule.description: Anglo-Saxon dominance principle. Simple words first. Latinate words only at $37-$47 for premium justification.

emphasis_rule.description: Bold emotional trigger words only. Italics for internal reader dialogue. Never bold full sentences. Left-align body copy only.

tactile_realism_markers.description: 10 micro-opinion openers — paste-ready to inject human voice and anti-AI texture into copy.
example: Honestly, I didn't expect this to work, but...
Here's the part most people don't say out loud:
If we're being real for a second...
Let me show you what this actually looks like in real life:
The part nobody puts on their sales page is...
I'm not going to pretend this is magic — here's the deal:
On paper, this looks simple. But in reality...
Here's where most people lose months without realizing it:

platform_voice_adaptation.description: Voice rules and niche-specific examples for each of the 4 primary platforms.

hook_structure.description: First 1-3 second hook formula. Format: [Uncomfortable truth] → [micro-story] → [pitch]

tone.description: Voice tone for this platform. Raw, first-person, relatable, direct.

example.description: Filled example hook written for the specific validated_niche.

format.description: Caption structure: hook → body → lesson → CTA. Social SEO via natural-language keywords.

tone.description: Polished but human. Conversational. Ends with save/share prompt.

example.description: Filled caption example written for the specific validated_niche.

tone.description: 1-to-1 friend letter tone. Verbal bridges in body: 'That said,' / 'But here's the thing,' / 'The upshot is...'

example.description: Filled subject line example for the specific validated_niche.

formula.description: 4 U's framework filled. Template: 'Get [Ultra-Specific Benefit] in [Urgent Timeframe] with [Unique Mechanism] — Even If [Biggest Objection].'
formula.const: Get [Ultra-Specific Benefit] in [Urgent Timeframe] with [Unique Mechanism] — Even If [Biggest Objection].

example.description: Filled 4 U's headline written for the specific validated_niche.

headline_formulas.description: Exactly 10 headline formulas, each with a niche-specific filled example. HALT if fewer than 10.

name.description: Name of the headline formula (e.g. 'They Laughed', 'How I...', etc.)

mechanism.description: The psychological mechanism this formula activates.

niche_example.description: Completed headline written for the exact validated_niche. No brackets remaining.

cta_copy.description: Call-to-action copy system. Button text, halo copy, urgency framing, and absolute prohibitions.

button_text_options.description: 5 first-person declaration button texts. Start with 'Get my' / 'Send me' / 'Grab my' / 'Show me' / 'Give me'.

surrounding_assurance.description: Halo copy adjacent to (not below) the button. Required components: 100% Secure Checkout + Instant Access + 30-Day Guarantee.

urgency_framing.description: Time-bound + specific quantity. Format: 'Only [X] copies at this price' or 'Offer ends [specific day, time, timezone].'

never_use.description: Absolute prohibitions on button text. Hard-coded. Do not override.

tactile_realism_copy.description: Sensory translation system converting abstract benefits into physical, felt micro-scenes.

sensory_benefits.description: Minimum 5 abstract-to-tactile translations. Each translation must be under 15 words and use a sensory scene.

abstract_benefit.description: The generic benefit as it would appear in weak copy (e.g. 'save time').

tactile_translation.description: The physical, sensory scene version. Under 15 words. Uses body, sound, sight, or feeling.
tactile_translation.example: Closing your laptop while the sun is still up

specificity_rule.description: Always use exact numbers, never rounded. '48,245 customers' not 'nearly 50,000'. 'Last Tuesday at 11:47 PM' not 'recently'.

vulnerability_opener.description: A niche-specific first-person vulnerability sentence that opens copy with human admission. Creates immediate trust and relatability.

fatal_errors.condition: Any banned word present in generated copy
Paragraph contains more than 3 sentences without a line break

fatal_errors.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — prohibited CTA button text detected]

fatal_errors.condition: Any claim present without specific data or tactile translation
fatal_errors.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — abstract claim without data or tactile anchor]

fatal_errors.condition: Verbatim samples not referenced in voice calibration output
fatal_errors.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — verbatim samples unused in voice calibration]

fatal_errors.condition: Hooks or Value Stack produced (belongs to Skill 05 only)
fatal_errors.error: [BLOCKING ERROR: brand-voice — hooks/Value Stack out of scope. Delegate to Skill 05]

fatal_errors.condition: headline_formulas array contains fewer than 10 items
